title: Richly Caramelized Dutch Pork Skillet
description: A festive Dutch dish featuring caramelized pork, shaoxing wine, and a floral flavor profile, served in a traditional molcajete vessel.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large molcajete vessel over medium high heat.
Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shaoxing wine, ground star anise, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium low and simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Increase heat to medium high and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring constantly, to caramelize the pork.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped scallions and a side of cauliflower rice.
Refrigerate or freeze leftovers for up to 3 days.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
